summary: feat(passkey): Add app server errors and passkey errors
description:
Because:
 - We want a structured and shared way to emit errors in the passkey
   service and other apps

This Commit:
 - Adds/reserves ERRNO's for passkey errors
 - Adds passkey internal errors using shared ERRNO's
 - Adds Apperror passkey errors with the shared ERRNO's
 - Adds test for all of these

Closes: FXA-12092
